milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17a.3 — Cache-buster on CSS + JS links. Phone review of M9.17a.2 was showing the same bleed despite deploy verification, which points at browser HTTP cache serving old css/style.css. Added ?v=<version> query to each <link rel=stylesheet> and to js/app.js so future milestone-deploy bumps force a fresh fetch. Future milestone-deploy steps should bump the version query alongside data/version.json.
